headline: TransDigm’s (NYSE:TDG) Q1 CY2026: Strong Sales
summary: Aerospace and defense company TransDigm (NYSE:TDG) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 18.3% year on year to $2.54 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $10.36 billion at the midpoint came in 2.6% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $9.85 per share was 4.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
